description: jewellery set Style Note Make heads turn in your direction wherever you go with this bold and beautiful handmade jewellery set from adrika. The entire range of jewellery is non toxic and will not cause any kind of harm to the skin. The jewellery is wearable even during the rainy season as the colours will not fade. Pair it with any outfit for a chic and stylish look. Product Details Maroon and copper coloured beads in different shapes woven on a string with a pull clasp and earrings to match with a plastic and metallic clasp at the back Material and Care Teracotta clay Wipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirt Size Length of necklace: 52 cms Length of earrings: 3 cms
